title: Opening and managing retirement accounts
description: Practice understanding of opening retirement accounts, risk tolerance, role of mutual funds in diversification, target date funds, and ideal contribution

assessment_items.question_content:
When saving and investing for retirement, it is important to diversify.

**Which of these investment choices offers good diversification?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

A portfolio is a *collection* of investments in your retirement account. 

**What happens when one investment in your diversified portfolio performs poorly?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

There are many ways to diversify your investments.

**Which of these is the easiest way to diversify?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: you buy only stocks from well-known companies
you focus on keeping a large amount of cash

assessment_items.question_content:
You are a young investor who has a lot of time until retirement. As such, you can take more risks when investing.

**Which of these investments matches your risk tolerance?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You are an older investor who has minimal time until retirement. As such, you need to take less risks when investing.

**Which of these investments matches your risk tolerance?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Investing and saving for retirement looks different depending on how long you have till you retire. 

**As you approach retirement, what should be your main investment goal?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: protecting your savings with steadier returns
keeping all your money in cash

assessment_items.question_content:
You are opening an IRA and have the following list of investment options:

| **Investment options**                     
|:----------------------------
| GreenTech Company (GTC)    
| City of Riverdale $3\%$ Bond $2030$    
| Liberty Global Equity Fund   
| Future Path $2050$ Fund        

**Which of these is a target-date mutual fund?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You are opening an IRA and have the following list of investment options:

| **Investment options**                     
|:----------------------------
| Standard $2040$ Fund    
| Urban Growth Company    
| American Investment Equity Fund   
| City of Springfield $5\%$ Bond $2060$      

**Which of these is a target-date mutual fund?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You are opening an IRA and have the following list of investment options:

| **Investment options**                     
|:----------------------------
|  City of Pleasantville $3\%$ Bond $2045$ 
|  Acme Equity Fund
| Up and Coming $2060$ Fund    
| Fast Automotive Company   

**Which of these is a target-date mutual fund?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Imagine it is year $2030$ and you are starting to save for retirement at your work. You have $30$ years before you retire and you would like to invest into something that offers diversification and adjusts itself as you get closer to retirement.

**Which of these investments is the best choice for your needs?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Imagine it is year $2040$ and you are starting to save for retirement at your work. You have $40$ years before you retire and you would like to invest into something that offers diversification and adjusts itself as you get closer to retirement.

**Which of these investments is the best choice for your needs?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Imagine it is year $2025$ and you are starting to save for retirement at your work. You have $25$ years before you retire and you would like to invest into something that offers diversification and adjusts itself as you get closer to retirement.

**Which of these investments is the best choice for your needs?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
